args.code: (() => { const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')); for (const b of btns) { const style = window.getComputedStyle(b); if (style.backgroundColor.includes('rgb(147, 51, 234)') || style.backgroundColor.includes('purple') || b.textContent.includes('Deploy') || b.textContent.includes('Развернуть')) { b.click(); return 'clicked deploy btn: ' + b.textContent.trim().slice(0,30); } } return 'no deploy btn found'; })()
